recentOps.title: Recent activity
recentOps.hint: See recent checkouts and returns in the Recent Activity view.

manualEntryPending.label: {count} manual entries pending
manualEntryPending.hint: Loan/return rows hand-typed into 22_MANUAL_ENTRY while GAS was down, not yet absorbed

lastBackup.label: Last backup
lastBackup.unavailable: No data — backup info isn't available yet.

camera.continuousModeHint: Keeps running without the idle auto-stop — for busy periods like lunch rush.
camera.offHint: The camera only turns on when you need it.

desktop.pinPin: Pin scans to this window (only one at a time)
desktop.maxWindows: Up to {max} windows can be open at once.

scannerWindow.confirmCloseContinuous: Continuous mode is on. Closing this window turns off the camera and unpins continuous mode. Continue?

loanReturn.hint: Scan a book to automatically checkout or return it
loanReturn.errorUnknownAction: {kind} failed — the server deployment is out of date. Redeploy Code.gs to a new version in Apps Script.
loanReturn.cannotCheckout: This book can't be checked out — {title} ({status})
loanReturn.isbnHint: ISBN scans are handled in the Register view.
loanReturn.manualUnknownFormat: Unrecognized format (7-digit copy barcode or S:studentCode).
loanReturn.awaitingStudent: Who's borrowing? — scan a student ID
loanReturn.recentCaption: (local display only — the sheet is the source of truth)
loanReturn.redirectRenewConfirmBody: Undo the return of {title} and renew it instead? The return will be undone (checked out again) and renewed together — this can't be undone.
loanReturn.redirectMarkLostConfirmBody: Undo the return of {title} and mark it lost instead? The return will be undone (checked out again) and marked lost together — this can't be undone. Enter the replacement fine.
loanReturn.redirectUndoFailed: Couldn't undo the return — {message} (renew/mark-lost can't proceed)
loanReturn.redirectRenewFailed: Renewal failed — {message} (the return was already undone — rescan the copy and use Book Detail)
loanReturn.redirectMarkLostDoneWithFine: Marked {title} as lost — new checkouts are blocked until the {amount} replacement fine is paid.
loanReturn.redirectMarkLostFailed: Marking as lost failed — {message} (the return was already undone — rescan the copy and use Book Detail)

register.scanHint: Once the camera is on, scan an ISBN (EAN-13) barcode.
register.dupBannerTitle: This book is already in the catalog: {title}
register.pencilHint: — write the copy number inside the front cover in pencil
register.requestIdLine: Request ID: {id} — cross-check this in the Apps Script execution log and the 18_SYS_OPERATIONS sheet
register.errorInvalidIsbn: Not a valid ISBN-13 (13 digits starting with 978/979, including check digit).
register.errorSaveFailed: Save failed — {reason} (try again or retry from the failed list)
register.errorNoOperator: No operator info — enter your login details in Settings.
register.bulkCountLabel: How many more of this book? (1–50)
register.bulkPencilHint: Copy each number onto its book in pencil

search.queryPlaceholder: Search by title, author, or barcode — Korean initials work too (e.g. ㅊㅅㅈ)
search.choseongHint: You can search with Korean initial consonants alone — e.g. "ㅊㅅㅈ" matches 채식주의자
search.empty: No matching results — try a different search term.

inventory.sessionHint: Continuous scan mode is now on — walk the shelves and scan each copy.
inventory.baselineCount: {count} copies in scope this session (available / hold-ready)
inventory.lostEmpty: No lost candidates — every copy in scope was checked.
inventory.eligibleNote: In scope: AVAILABLE and HOLD_READY copies. ON_LOAN copies are excluded because they're expected to be absent from the shelves (they're with a member) — that's normal, not a loss. LOST, WITHDRAWN, and REPAIR copies are excluded because their whereabouts are already accounted for.
inventory.notSyncedHint: The catalog mirror isn't ready yet — try again shortly.

catalog.empty: The catalog mirror is empty — waiting for sync.
catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search by barcode, title, or author

bookDetail.invalidQuery: No book to show — pick one from the catalog or open a registration number link.
bookDetail.actionsHint: Reserve is handled below — renew/mark-lost are row actions in the copies list, and mark-paid is a row action on a lost copy.
bookDetail.confirmRenewBody: Renew the loan for {barcode}? This action can't be undone.
bookDetail.confirmMarkLostBody: Mark {barcode} as lost? A replacement fine will be assessed, and this member's new checkouts will be blocked until it's paid in full. This action can't be undone.
bookDetail.confirmCompensateBody: Mark the remaining replacement balance of {amount} for {member}'s {title} as fully paid? This action can't be undone.
bookDetail.markLostDoneWithFine: Marked {barcode} as lost — {member} is blocked from new checkouts until the {amount} replacement fine is paid in full.
bookDetail.compensateDone: {member}'s compensation is complete — the checkout block is lifted.

recentOps.searchPlaceholder: Search by action, summary, or staff

noLoanFinder.title: Find students with no loans
noLoanFinder.sinceDateHint: Leave blank to use the last 3 months.
noLoanFinder.totalCountLine: {count} enrolled students with no loans since {date}
noLoanFinder.empty: Every enrolled student has at least one loan.

homeroom.title: Homeroom report
homeroom.interactivePreviewHint: Sortable and filterable — the printed report follows the preview below.
homeroom.noLoanEmpty: No students without a loan this month.

weeding.title: Dead stock / purchase picks
weeding.subtitle: Acquired {years}+ years ago with no loan history = weeding candidate · titles with a reservation queue large relative to their copy count = duplicate-purchase candidate

recall.title: Recall notices
recall.subtitle: Groups all currently overdue loans by homeroom class into perforated slips for printing.
recall.cutLineHint: Cut along the dashed lines and hand each strip to the matching homeroom teacher.

donor.title: Donor thank-you letters
donor.subtitle: Year-end donor list / thank-you letter material — grouped as-is by acquisition source (acquisition_source).
donor.disclaimer: Group names are not verified donor names — they are the raw acquisition-source text entered when each copy was registered. Confirm a group actually refers to a donor before issuing a thank-you letter for it.
donor.skippedNote: {count} copies with no acquisition source were excluded from the totals.
donor.donorEmpty: No copies could be grouped (acquisition source is required).

annualOperations.title: Annual operations report
annualOperations.subtitle: Loan statistics · collection size (change) · acquisition cost total (budget proof) · top loans · overdue summary — for submission to the operating committee/education office.
annualOperations.collectionSkippedNote: {count} copies with no acquisition date were excluded from this total.
annualOperations.budgetTotalLine: Total acquisition cost for this period: {amount}

unpaidFines.title: Unpaid replacements
unpaidFines.subtitle: Members with an unpaid replacement fine — new checkouts are blocked until paid in full.

vizInsights.title: Collection insights
vizInsights.subtitle: Collection vs. loans treemap · turnover quadrant — todo/06

reservations.searchPlaceholder: Search by title or member name

loanHeatmap.title: Loan calendar
loanHeatmap.subtitle: Daily loan counts over the last year — when are we busy, by season and weekday
loanHeatmap.tableCaption: Daily loan counts over the last year
loanHeatmap.empty: No loans recorded in the last year.

categoryTreemap.title: Collection vs. loans treemap
categoryTreemap.subtitle: Which subjects are well-stocked but underused?

turnoverQuadrant.title: Turnover quadrant
turnoverQuadrant.subtitle: Star / rookie / dormant / dead stock — the basis for weeding and duplicate purchases
turnoverQuadrant.totalLine: {count} copies counted (excludes {skipped} with no acquisition date)

reservationPressure.title: Reservation pressure
reservationPressure.subtitle: What to buy right now
reservationPressure.empty: No titles currently have an active queue.

loanTimeOfDay.title: Daily wave
loanTimeOfDay.subtitle: Loans by hour of day over the last 90 days — the lunch peak, a basis for station and helper staffing
loanTimeOfDay.empty: No loans recorded in the last 90 days.

overdueFlow.title: Overdue flow
overdueFlow.subtitle: Is the suspension policy working? — weekly overdue occurrences vs. resolutions

classParticipation.title: Class participation rings
classParticipation.subtitle: Loan participation by class over the last 90 days — straight to the homeroom report

monthlyLoanCurve.title: Twelve-month curve
monthlyLoanCurve.subtitle: Monthly loan volume, years overlaid — vacation valleys, back-to-school peaks

shelfHeatmap.title: Shelf temperature
shelfHeatmap.subtitle: Average loans per copy by shelf — a basis for reshelving, finding dead zones
shelfHeatmap.skippedLine: Excludes {count} copies with no shelf assigned

collectionAge.title: Collection age
collectionAge.subtitle: Status breakdown by acquisition year — the scale of aged and uninspected stock
collectionAge.staleLine: {count} circulating copies among these haven't been inventory-checked in {days}+ days
collectionAge.skippedLine: Excludes {count} copies with no acquisition date

gradeReadingGap.title: Grade reading gap
gradeReadingGap.subtitle: Loan-count distribution by grade over the last 6 months — which grade is falling behind

budgetPicture.title: Budget picture
budgetPicture.subtitle: Cumulative acquisition cost by year — material for the operating report (R3)
budgetPicture.tableCaption: Acquisition cost by year and source
budgetPicture.skippedLine: Excludes {source} copies with no acquisition source and {date} with no acquisition date

common.notReady: Login method not yet decided — route only.

bookPage.title: Student Book Page

status.onLoan: Another student is reading this now
status.unavailable: Not available to borrow right now

bookPage.loginGateMessage: Coming soon — ask your librarian to check it out
